case_title: THE NORTH BEACH ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. THE PARK SF, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE NORTH BEACH ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE PARK SF, LLC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1652 STOCKTON STREET SAN FRANCISCO CA 94133 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100215973)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100215461) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT THE PARK SF, LLC

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE NORTH BEACH ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT THE PARK SF, LLC DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100214200), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE NORTH BEACH ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED SEP-14-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE PARK SF, LLC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100214610) AS TO DEFENDANT THE PARK SF, LLC
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE / $891.00 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE NORTH BEACH ASSOCIATES, LLC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (COMMERCIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE NORTH BEACH ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT THE PARK SF, LLC DOES 1 TO 20
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100215435) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF THE NORTH BEACH ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT THE PARK SF, LLC
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100215461) AS TO DEFENDANT THE PARK SF, LLC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT THE PARK SF, LLC
